faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Why do nurses fail Nursing classes?
faqs.answer:
Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:
Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.
Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.
Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.
Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

faqs.question: Which subject is best for MSc Nursing?
faqs.answer:
There are various forms of nursing, and if you want to become a Nurse in one of the many sectors, you will need particular certifications, some of which you may earn by studying a variety of vital subjects. The following are examples:
Biology
Chemistry
Physics
Applied Science
Health and Social Care
Psychology
Sociology
Physical Education

faqs.question: How can I get into Global College of Nursing, Marthandam for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Global College of Nursing, Marthandam has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Sc. (Post Basic) Candidates should be registered as Registered Nurses and Registered Midwives (RNRM). Candidates should possess a three-year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM). Candidates should have a minimum of two years of experience in the profession (after registration as RNRM).
B.Sc. Candidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Science stream from a recognised board.
GNM Registered ANM with pass mark.
BOPTM Candidate must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics or Biology and obtained minimum mentioned marks from a recognised board.
UG Diploma Candidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Global College of Nursing, Marthandam offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Science and Nursing. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., UG Diploma and B.Sc. (Post Basic). On the other hand, at the PG level, the Global College of Nursing, Marthandam offers M.Sc. and M.Optom.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offered by Global College of Nursing, Marthandam are M.Sc., M.Optom., B.Sc. (Post Basic), B.Sc., GNM, BOPTM, UG Diploma. These courses are in the stream of Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. Global College of Nursing, Marthandam offers specializations such as B.Sc. specializations in Emergency Medical Technology, Echo Cardiology & Cardiac Technology, Critical Care Nursing, Dialysis Technology, Medical Laboratory Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Physician Assistant, Radiology, GNM specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery, BOPTM specializations in Optometry, UG Diploma specializations in Medical Laboratory Technology.
faqs.question: Which courses are available at Global College of Nursing, Marthandam for students?

faqs.answer: A:    Global College of Nursing, Marthandam courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as INC. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Global College of Nursing, Marthandam goes up to 435.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% or above students got the placements. 20 students got placed in one year. The highest package was 1,25,000 LPA. The internship hospital was well-facilitated and well-developed. Top roles offered in healthcare department, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College had Wi-Fi campus. Classrooms were well-furnished. Library, canteen, and everything were well developed. It provided good transportation. Facilities were good. It provided 24 hour water service. Kerala food was also available. Hostels had a shelf, and bed was like a dormitory.

college_info.college_name: College of Dental Sciences

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for College of Dental Sciences admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Dental Sciences provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 7,97,250 to 15,25,000. UG programs include BDS. Further, the PG programs include MDS.

reviews_list.review_title: College of dental sciences .

review_content.Placements: No placements will be there in Medical field. There will be internship according to RGUHS University for 1 year and stipend will be around 2 thousand per month. Internship is necessary to get good exposure for patients before private practice. Patients inflow is huge in this college .
review_content.Infrastructure: College is of 3 blocks- A, B, C. There is no campus in college classrooms,. Library is well-equipped with modern equipments, reading room, computer section. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls. In boy's hostel, the Infrastructure is not good but mess is excellent than the outside mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Really it is an amazing college where you can learn dentistry with good knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has a strength of 80 students, and I am not sure about the salary offered and all. Many top recruiting companies recruit students from our college. Dentistry is not a profession, which is done to get recruited in some company and to earn some money it is a course chosen by passion. Many students prefer to set up their own practice instead of getting recruited by some company.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms have very good infrastructures, and all labs, lecture halls, seminar rooms, auditorium and everything is modern and fully updated. The library is a benefit in this college as it provides you with a huge range of collection of various books to study. Hostels are good, and the food served is also fine. Sports and games are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The college has a huge campus but not well maintained. But, yes education is very good, friendly staff and nice atmosphere. The college is located on the out skirts of the city but has nice hostel facility, mess and a nice canteen too. Since the college is more of a hospital with patients, so you can work easily and gain live experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in this course every year. The highest package is -6.5 Lacs per annum INR, the lowest package is -1.2 Lacs per annum INR and the average package is 2.5-4 Lacs per annum INR. The top recruiting companies are Glenmark, Cardiac health care Ltd, sun pharmaceuticals, CCBI, etc. 95% of students get internships from this course in top multispeciality hospitals. The top roles offered in this course are clinical pharmacist, Duty doctor, research scientist, and other services, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Digital classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, library, digital library, cafeteria, etc. The infrastructure of the building is very good with a good garden area, Wi-Fi available campus, and a fully air-conditioned campus. The quality and facilities of the hostel were well good. The quality of the food is good and delicious. The canteen is present. Sports and games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of its staff motivation.

review_content.Placements: In this college, only 31 students are taken. The highest salary offered is 50,000 LPA, and the average salary offered is 75,000 LPA. Pharma.D is a 6 years course which is a PG course that will give students a doctorate. Now pharmacovigilance companies are recruiting more for students, 15 students get a chance in IQUIA, and the remaining are going on with their choices. A clinical pharmacist is a top role along with that counselor, industrialist, and Pharma.D students are eligible for all the roles which are done by B.Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is available. Along with that students have a central library that is only for MBBS, BDS, and Pharma.D students. It provides a ground and a gym. Good laboratory equipment in the laboratory is available, and well-trained staff. Hostels will be very good. They charge around 11,000 per year and separate for the mess. Boys do not have hostels in the college. But near to college many PGs are available, and it also has hospital. Every week students will have sports class i.e on every Saturday 1:30 PM to 5.00 PM.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's really a great place to experience everything in your life. All the facilities are great.

content.Placements: I did not participate in an internship, but I have heard from other students who did. They all had a great experience. They learned a lot about animals, and the stipend was INR 10,000.
content.Infrastructure: A hostel's infrastructure typically includes a variety of facilities designed to cater to the needs of its residents. Essential elements include rooms and dormitories, which may be single or double rooms with attached or shared bathrooms. Desirable elements include common areas, dining areas, and laundry facilities.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very highly qualified and experienced, and the curriculum is comfortable and good. The semester exams aren't that hard, which makes them a good exercise for great results in finals. But the best part is the hands-on learning in the practical labs. There is so much knowledge to be gained from seeing how animals are treated.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Apollo College of Veterinary Medicine - Rajasthan.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. They only provide internships facility within, and this college is associated. Students have to prepare separately for interviews for any company. This degree only gives students an edge advice over others in their field of choice.
content.Infrastructure: All modern facilities are available ranging from smart classrooms, practical laboratories, and libraries. Wi-Fi is also enabled, and medical facilities are excellent. Mess and sports facilities are up to the mark. Currently, no canteen facility is available. The food is of great quality with high variety.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Do not join mamata dental college khammam. College is ruled with harassment and fear.

review_content.Placements: No placements as boosted in many reviews. Placements are just baited for the parents to join their kids into this college. In fact, they do not even conduct any workshops/ sessions to help students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In Khammam's Mamata dental college, the Patient count is very low. To mitigate this low count, they adapt cheap methods like writing dummy patient records, making the interns write dummy patient records, and show them during college inspections. The actual count is roughly about 1/3 rd of what is shown. The college runs under the micromanagement of a Woman (who is Dean's wife and also a professor of Conservative dentistry), who do not encourage any skill enhancement programs. She manages the students & staff with constant threats and fears. No new clinical skill is encouraged in the college. As the students are kept under constant fear they do not even think of asking for new learning and skills. This will make them very underskilled after their graduation, as they do not stand the competition from other college pass-outs. Girls hostel members are treated like prisoners. The warden is a professor of Conservative dentistry who threatens to fail girls due to personal grudges of the hostel. There are also rumours that few students committed suicide due to her extreme harassment, but they are not brought to the limelight due to their political influence. Outings are not given, due to which we girls faced problems in buying basic personal hygiene stuff, but still, the warden just don't care.

review_summary.college_name: Mamata Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Mamata Dental College.

content.Placements: There are 100 people in our batch, and we will study the course for four years. In the third year, we have the opportunity to provide services in a hospital. After completing the four-year course, you must do a one-year internship at Mamatha Hospital, which will provide valuable experience for the future.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are not very impressive, but they are acceptable for living. The food could also see significant improvement. Overall, it's not bad. If we have any complaints regarding the hostels or if anything is not functioning, there is a complaint book where we can address our issues, and they will check and resolve them.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A quick review to Mamata Dental College.

content.Placements: As I am in a medical course, they don't offer placements but they do offer internships for 1 year. Every student has to compulsorily complete the internship to get the certificate after completing four years of studies in the same college, which is Mamata Dental College.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite decent, and it can be much better, but it is not bad. Hostel food is also pretty average which can be better, but the hostel rooms are good, which gives you a healthy environment to study. The library is really well maintained and is the best place to study during exams.

faqs.answer: A:    FIEM Kolkata admission 2024 is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers MBA and BTech, BCA, MCA and other popular courses at the UG and PG level. FIEM Kolkata accepting exams are WBJEE JEE Main WBJEE JELET, MAT etc. for providing admission to BTech and MBA courses.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Future Institute of Engineering and Management for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    FIEM accepts various entrance exam scores for various courses, the entrance exam accepted for B.Tech are:WBJEE (West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination)JEE Main (Joint Entrance Examination Main)JELET (Joint Entrance Examination for Lateral Entry). The candidate must also have completed 10+2 education from a recognised board with minimum 50% aggregate for securing a seat in B.Tech.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Future Institute of Engineering and Management accept for admission to B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management are based on entrance exams, Example for engineering students are expected to score a good rank in entrance exams like WBJEE or JEE Mains But for MBA With scores of CMAT/JEMAT/MAT, Marks in graduation also plays a important role in taking admission in the college
faqs.question: Are admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    Undergraduate and graduate admissions are available at the Future Institute of Engineering and Management in Kolkata. Admission to FIEM Kolkata is determined via entrance. To be considered for admission to FIEM Kolkata for a BTech program, students must first take the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) and then undergo WBJEE counseling. The admission to the BTech programme at FIEM Kolkata is contingent upon the JEE Main result. MAT/JEMAT is a requirement for applicants seeking admission to the FIEM Kolkata MBA program. Shortlisted candidates have to attend the JEMAT counseling session. Candidates get admitted to FIEM Kolkata MCA programs based on their results in the West Bengal Joint Examination for Masters in Computer Applications (WB JECA). Later, WBJECA centralised counselling is conducted to fill the seats.

review_content.Placements: 35 to 50 percent of students usually get placed at FIEM Kolkata, with CSE and IT often recording higher placement rates. The highest packages reach around 9 to 12 LPA, while most students get offers between 3 and 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini visit the campus regularly. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and basketball.

review_summary.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is moderate, but it is still good.

content.Placements: According to college data, 70% of students got on-campus placement. The highest package from my course was around 6 LPA, and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. Many companies came to recruit from our college, but the top ones were Amazon, TCS, Infosys, etc. Around 6–7 students get placed at Amazon from our department every year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my course/department was very good. What I liked about my college was a lot. We had dedicated 2 labs only for our department students. A seminar room was also present where students could discuss events and spend their time. There were also dedicated Wi-Fi and a single but well-maintained library. Although hostel students said the rooms were not that good. The food sometimes came out to be bad. The canteen food was definitely bad, and the medical facilities were not very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of students got placed. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, Career Comfort, Wipro, Huron, Zensar, Tech Mahindra, Teleperformance, Accenture, Cognizant, etc. Internship is less as we have got more job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: FIEM's 5-acre Kolkata campus features more than 32 smart classrooms, over 82 labs, and a 60k-book library. It offers 3 AC auditoriums, Wi-Fi, sports grounds, and a canteen. This eco-friendly hub blends modern tech with top amenities for students. I was not in the hostel, but I heard from others that it is good.

The highest packages reach around 9 to 12 LPA, while most students get offers between 3 and 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini visit the campus regularly. Many students also secure internships in IT and consulting roles through these recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: FIEM Kolkata provides a good set of facilities for engineering students. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good college. You should come here.

content.Placements: 95 percent of students were placed last year. The placement is very good, and many companies come here, like TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is 30 LPA, and sometimes it's more than this average package, which is 7 LPA-8 LPA, but the below-average package is 2 LPA-3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and friendly. Overall very good and very nice. The department has actively engaged students through hands-on training, field internships, and specialized coaching for slow learners. The use of innovative pedagogical techniques is also increasing. So many faculty members are there. Good teachers. They help you as they can, and the students participating in class discussions and group work, they help students to work on balancing a long-term project and any confusion about the assignment, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the placement opportunities and the faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed from my college. The placement cell was very active and efficient. Wipro was one of the major recruiters. Most students secured jobs in companies like Infosys, Mindtree, and TCS. The faculty members of the ECE department were excellent. The highest package offered was around 8-9 LPA, while the average package was between 3.5 to 4 LPA. The roles were mainly for management trainee, analyst, and software developer positions. Overall, this college is very good for placements in ECE, CSE, and IT streams.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average, and the building condition is acceptable. Hostel facilities are not available on the college campus, but paying guest accommodations are available nearby. The labs are excellent and well-maintained, with practical sessions taken very seriously. The library is outstanding and a great place to study. Wi-Fi facility is available. There is a small canteen where snacks are served, but the playground is quite small.

admission_overview.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Application & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: FIEM Kolkata admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers MBA and BTech, BCA, MCA and other popular courses at the UG and PG level. FIEM Kolkata accepting exams areWBJEEJEE MainWBJEE JELET,MATetc. for providing admission to BTech and MBA courses. Given below are the key highlights forFIEM Kolkataadmission:
Check below theFIEM Kolkata coursesalong with their eligibility, fees and selection criteria:

English, Physics, Mathematics, and any one of Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Computer Science, Computer Application, or a Technical Vocational Subject. Individual pass marks, both in theory and practical where applicable, are mandatory, with a minimum of 45% in class 12
WBJEE,JEE Main,WBJEE, JELET
Bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate.

Candidates seeking admission to FIEM Kolkata must take any of these entrance exams, i.e. WBJEE,JEE Main,WBJEE, JELET. Candidates must apply for any one of the aforementioned entrance exams through their official website.
Step 1: FIEM Kolkata Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to their FIEM Kolkata must fill out the application form for the accepted entrance exam such as MAT, JEMAT, WBJEE, and JECA through their official website by paying the required application fee for final submission.
Step 2: FIEM Kolkata Selection Criteria 2025
FIEM Kolkata admission is entirely entrance exam based, candidates based on their scores in WBJEE/ JECA/ JMAT/ MAT will be shortlisted for Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds.
Step 3: FIEM Kolkata Final Seat Allotment 2025
Candidates who qualify for the GD and PI rounds are required to report to the admission cell at FIEM Kolkata for document verification andtuition feepayment for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA course at FIEM?
faqs.answer: The primary eligibility criteria for admission to the MBA course at FIEM are that candidates must complete their graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Additionally, for the selection process, the college accepts scores from different management entrance exams, i.e.,MAT/WBJEMAT. Followed by a GD and PI round.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech course at FIEM?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake for the BTech course at FIEM is 666. The college mainly offers a similar number of seats for its BTech courses. Candidates who wish to secure a seat in the BTech course must complete their Class 12 in Science with an aggregate of 45%. Additionally, secure a valid score in the accepted entrance exam— JEE Mains/ WBJEE.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Admissions at Future Institute of Engineering and Management are based on entrance exams, Example for engineering students are expected to score a good rank in entrance exams like WBJEE or JEE Mains But for MBA With scores of CMAT/JEMAT/MAT, Marks in graduation also plays a important role in taking admission in the college

faqs.question: Can I join Future Institute of Engineering and Management directly?
faqs.answer: You can't join the Future Institute of Engineering and Management Directly as it is not permitted. You can be admitted to this college through the Counselling process after clearing the entrance exam like JEE Mains or WBJEE with a good rank which is required to get admitted to the college. However, you can be admitted directly to future Intitute of Engineering and Management via direct seat quota.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for BSc course at FIEM Delhi?
faqs.answer: The selection process for the BSc course at FIEM Delhi includes relevant scores of the entrance exam, MAKAUT CET. Before being admitted to the course, applicants are required to complete their minimum eligibility criteria; that is, applicants must complete their Class 12 from a recognised board of education and must have studied English as one of their main subjects.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available after completing an MBA course from FIEM?
faqs.answer: An MBA degree from FIEM offers a wide range of professional opportunities across various industries. The students are highly skilled for jobs in management, finance, marketing, human resources, and consulting. The programme instils the information and expertise required for leadership positions and allows students to attain lucrative jobs, lead as managers, or even set up their businesses in today's dynamic business environment. reviews.review_heading: The college is moderate, but it is still good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course/department was very good. What I liked about my college was a lot. We had dedicated 2 labs only for our department students. A seminar room was also present where students could discuss events and spend their time. There were also dedicated Wi-Fi and a single but well-maintained library. Although hostel students said the rooms were not that good. The food sometimes came out to be bad. The canteen food was definitely bad, and the medical facilities were not very go...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: FIEM's 5-acre Kolkata campus features more than 32 smart classrooms, over 82 labs, and a 60k-book library. It offers 3 AC auditoriums, Wi-Fi, sports grounds, and a canteen. This eco-friendly hub blends modern tech with top amenities for students. I was not in the hostel, but I heard from others that it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Reliable academics and decent placements with good overall facilities
reviews.review_text: FIEM Kolkata provides a good set of facilities for engineering students. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and the campus offers Wi-Fi which may vary in speed at times. Labs for CSE, IT, and core branches are equipped well enough for regular practicals. The library has a strong collection of books, journals, and digital resources. The campus includes auditoriums and seminar halls for events and workshops. Sports facilities cover football, cricket, and indoor games like table tennis and b...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college. You should come here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placement opportunities and the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average, and the building condition is acceptable. Hostel facilities are not available on the college campus, but paying guest accommodations are available nearby. The labs are excellent and well-maintained, with practical sessions taken very seriously. The library is outstanding and a great place to study. Wi-Fi facility is available. There is a small canteen where snacks are served, but the playground is quite small.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and infrastructure are really very good, and the teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: In the labs and library, there are ACs, and the classrooms are very neat and clean. The internet connection, i.e., Wi-Fi, is very good, and we never face any issues while doing any class in the lab. Almost every sport is played in our college on our FIEM ground. Every food is available at the canteen, and the quality is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college and all types of sports are available. Placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, and all classrooms are neat and clean. Also have smart board classroom. Future Institution of Engineering and Management College also has a canteen. Food is awesome and quality full. All things are available in BCA example, Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library.

reviews.review_heading: College was good in placement, but now not like that much.
reviews.review_text: This college provides good and not-so-good lab facilities. Some labs are well-equipped with modern technology and some are not. College has no personal hostel. Library is very good, every type of book is available. It is big library. Outside of college, there are 4 private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A good review of FIEM.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for your course/department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are outstanding. The quality of the facilities in hostel and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games all are very good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for engineering and totally worth it.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are quite good, but Wi-Fi is too slow. But all the facilities in the college are good enough for study. The food in the campus canteen is not so good. There are several sports activities to do on campus. There are also indoor games and tournaments on campus.

reviews.review_heading: About Fiem College & Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was not there for us, not sure about if it was there now or not. Labs and classrooms are average with less facilities. Library was quite large and had a great ambiance too. Wi-Fi facility was there in the library for all. Overall, it was average infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Future Institute of Engineering and Management
reviews.review_text: Its average and not so great. The infrastructure is decent, not good enough but not bad at all. Canteen looks great from inside, food is not at all good. Basically canteen is used for stationary purpose now, they have all the things which you will be needed for your course.

reviews.review_heading: Ups and downs came in the 4 years.
reviews.review_text: There's no college hostel. Students from outside Kolkata stay in nearby PGs. There's no free Wi-Fi for students. The library is good, and you get free Wi-Fi there only. There are 4 clubs in the college, which arrange amazing fests. The canteen is not good, as per me.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Future Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Choose wisely as your future depends on it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious and well-ventilated classrooms equipped with projectors. Some classrooms have smart boards. In some classrooms, projectors don't work. There is a networking lab and a cloud computing lab but equipment needs some upgradation. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls with single, double, and triple-sharing rooms. Mess facilities are available but their meals are not very delicious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Future Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus for all purposes.
reviews.review_text: In our college, classrooms, a lab, and other things are very good and well-maintained. Our college should improve the canteen food and the main entrance of the college. There is no hostel on this campus.

college_info.college_name: Future Institute of Engineering and Management Scholarship Details

paragraphs: BTech in Electronics and Communication Engineering is an AICTE-approved programme at FIEM. Candidates, who have passed class 12th with a minimum of 45% with a valid score in JEE Mains or WBJEE are eligible to pursue the programme. Candidates have to pay an approximately fees of INR 4.06 Lacs for the programme.

Yes, FIEM does scholarships for BSc students. Majorly the scholarships are offered to BSc students on the basis of their merit, the scores they achieved in their higher senior secondary, and their entrance exam. Additionally, the college offers minorities scholarships, the Swami Vivekananda Scholarship, and other government-aided scholarships and freeships. Before applying for the scholarships, candidates must complete the eligibility requirements and apply through the official website of the college.

Future Institute of Engineering and Management offers scholarship only for the students who have done well in their higher secondary and graduation examinations. Students opting for B.Sc in Media Science and M.Sc in Media Science will be able to grab the opportunity of gaining a scholarship from the institution. Scholarship worth Rs 25,000 will be given to the deserving candidates. To avail the scholarship, candidates must score more than 80% in the 12th board exam if they are opting for the B.Sc course. For the ones aspiring for the M.Sc course can get the scholarship only if they scored 60% and above in their graduation along with a good academic track record.

The institution also provides students with an education loan. With this, the institution intends to support the students with their financial problems so that they are able to study their desired course without any problems. For this, FIEM has joined hands with HDFC Bank, to provide education loan to the students. In order to take this sanctioned education loan, students need to produce certain specified documents.

Yes, FIEM does scholarships for BBA students. Majorly the scholarships are offered to BBA students on the basis of their merit, the scores they achieved in their higher senior secondary, and their entrance exam. Additionally, the college offers minorities scholarships, the Swami Vivekananda Scholarship, and other government-aided scholarships and freeships. Before applying for the scholarships, candidates must complete the eligibility requirements and apply through the official website of the college.

college_info.college_name: Government Ayurved College and Hospital Fees 2026

fees_overview.description: Students wishing to get into the programmes offered at Government Ayurved College and Hospital are charged a certain amount as fees. The total tuition fees may vary depending on the course and specialisation chosen by the candidates. reviews.review_text: The requirements, like bones and chemicals, are provided by our college. We had a hostel facility on our campus, so there were no other issues with going to college by vehicle or something. Our college provides the best OPD, so we have the best doctors.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very famous college for teaching.

faqs.answer:
A:    Karpagam College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaShe/he Should registered in state pharmacy council as a registered Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act.Pharm.DCandidate shall have passed HSC examination with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Botany & Zoology or Mathematics subjects.
Vocational stream & National open school certificate is not eligible for admission.
Candidate shall have passed D.Pharmacy from an institution approved by Pharmacy Council of India under section 12 of the Pharmacy Act 1948.
Candidate should have completed 17 years of age on the date of admission or should complete the age of 17 years on or before 31st December of the year of admission.B.PharmaCandidate should have completed 17 years of age on the date of admission or should complete the age of 17 years on or before 31st December of the year of admission.

highlights.summary:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good medical school with great staff, average extracurricular, and recreational activities.

review_content.Placements: All of the students and our seniors prepare for getting PG and some of them succeed in getting so. Since placements are not how medical colleges work. But students do get PG seats from higher medical colleges like AIIMS after practicing MBBS here.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are the basic amenities fulfilled by this campus. Students have a good library with all the books needed for the course. The laboratories needed for the specific department are fully equipped for training students to become a doctor. Many new amenities are being added every passing year. The college does not have Wi-Fi, but has one in the hostel which is not particularly good. The mess is average. The canteen has been closed due to the pandemic. Sports activities are available to students interested. The hospital is very good and has all the necessary amenities to prepare for becoming a doctor.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in General Medicine - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good with its environment.

review_content.Placements: It is the best college for MBBS in Pondicherry. I recommend this college to students who are interested to study anatomy deeply.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food served in our college was average. Hostel rooms were average but served good food.
review_content.Faculty: Exams were conducted every month and sometimes weekly. Students of our course should have more knowledge and concentration as they treat patients.
review_content.Other: I chose this course to treat patients. Many festivals and cultural programs were organised in our college like Onam, Pongal, Ramzan, etc. It gives a very good college life. Students who scored more than 400 marks in the NEET exam can get admission to this college.

description: Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16513 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 16513 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17333 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 3527 to 22970, with MD in General Medicine being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in General Medicine, with a round 3 closing rank of 3527 for the General AI category. In contrast, the cutoff for the OBC AI category for the same specialisation was 3593.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital MBBS Cutoff 2024 has been released for Round 1. The cutoff was released category-wise for candidates belonging to different categories under the HS quota. In 2024, for the General HS category candidates, the cutoff rank during Round 1 was closed at 1306. For the OBC HS category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 1730.

Government Villupuram Medical College And Hospital Cutoff 2024 has been released for its second round based on candidates' performance in the Tamil Nadu NEET PG exam. The Round 2 cutoff for admission to the MD was 4892, for the General HS quota. For the OBC category candidates, the cutoff rank for the same course stood at 4937.

content.Infrastructure: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. Top recruiters like Accenture, Deloitte, Zomato, and others visit our college. We enroll in positions such as robotics engineer and game developer, among others. The highest salary package offered is 34 LPA. Around 92% of students can find work.
content.Infrastructure: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

admission_overview.college_name: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai admission 2025 is open.Affiliated to theUniversity of Madras,Hindustan College of Arts & Science (HCAS), Chennai is a part of the Hindustan Group of Institutions.HCAS admission is merit-based and registrations for online admission to HCAS are open as per its official website.The college offers 17 undergraduate, seven postgraduate, three MPhil, and two PhD programmes in varied fields such asScience, Commerce,Humanities,Management,Information Technology, etc.HCAS Chennaialso offers distance education in some of the PG programmes such as MBA, MSc, and MCA.

For UG, PG, and Research courses, candidates must have completed their Class 12, graduation, and post-graduation, respectively. It also offers some add-on courses along with some of its UG/ PG courses. HCAS Admission to most of the offered programmes is merit-based. Therefore. candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria. Find below theHCAS Chennai courseseligibility/selection criteria for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai fees range from INR 50,000 to INR 2 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the fee once their application form is verified and approved. The college also offers merit scholarships to its students. Find below the course-wise fees for 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
For admission toHCAS courses, candidates must complete the multi-step admission procedure which is completely online. Find below the detailed steps:
Step 1: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Application

Candidates must visitHindustan College's official websiteto apply. The application process begins with a new registration, which requires candidates to sign-upon the official website of the college. After registration, candidates can access the application form.
Step 2: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Shortlisting

Eligible applications will be shortlisted for the further admission process. Shortlisting is done based on the performance in the candidate's last qualifying exam. Shortlisted candidates will receive a confirmation mail. Now candidates can make the fee payment to finalise the admission,
Step 3: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Documents Verifications
Candidates will have to visit the college office for document verification. The date and time will be mailed.

faqs.answer: The college provides diverse undergraduate programs in fields like arts, science, commerce, management, and computer applications. reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. There are more than 20 conference halls hosting events and competitions, where students studying various subjects, organize competitions and other events. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for M.Sc. in the computer science course.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi in classrooms, computer labs, and a library for the students. The college has provided laptops to all the students. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure, and the food served is also good. A medical laboratory is located in our college, and various sports events are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in computer science courses.
reviews.review_text: This college is well-maintained and one of the best colleges in India. Campus is excellent, and the location is suitable for students. This college is well-equipped. Classrooms are well-equipped. Wi-Fi system is also good, and connectivity is provided. It also has a library. For boys, there is a separate hostel named management hostel, for girls. They go to triveni complex. It also offers a good riot, a dedicated student health center, and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Information Technology course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has first-rate facilities. Every course at our college has its own computer. There is Wi-Fi at our college. The design of the classrooms is requisite. The hostel is excellent. The hotel's cuisine is good. Good food is served in the restaurant. Clinics are available at our college. Participation in extracurricular activities and sports is encouraged among students.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on my college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good, and they are very friendly with all students except one or two. Other things like the library, classroom, and others are good. The hostel is very bad. They will only take fees from us, but everything will be bad, like food and other things. They will only provide a room and food for the highest fees (₹25,000 per month) I have ever paid for a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: My course has amazing materials. Wi-Fi and air conditioning are accessible in all classrooms. There is plenty of computer space, classrooms are very large and pleasant, and libraries are available for departments. Good eating is convenient and straightforward. A reputable clinic operates around the clock. Sports and games play an important role.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories and classrooms were clean and well-equipped. The hostel provides all amenities such as a gym, Wi-Fi, and a game area, as well as all sports equipment. The quality of mess meals is average. Our college has two libraries, one for the MBA, medical department, and the other for the Information Technology branch, and both have all of the texts available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are superb. We pay special attention to facilities such as a state-of-the-art library and a clinic for students and professors. Classrooms are outfitted with ventilated displays. We have around 5 large and small canteens with average meal quality. The hostel rooms are lovely, the old ones livable, and the modern ones ideal.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was best college for the MSc in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: College had best infrastructure I have ever seen or experienced. College management met all of pupils fundamental needs. Other advanced features include classrooms with smart boards, electricity, and internet access. College settings and environs were maintained on a daily basis. Pleasant setting for mental wellness and concentration.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped infrastructure with good lab facilities and projectors in all classes, Wi-Fi connectivity, a good library, and a pleasant learning environment. The hostel facilities are excellent; the rooms are spotless, and the food is fresh and healthy. The amenities are cleaned daily, and the rooms are big and air-conditioned. Medical facilities are adequate, and staff are attentive to students' needs. Sports and activities help us stay healthy and fit.

reviews.review_heading: I can rate this college out of 5, & I can give it 4.5 because of the best teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well maintained. Good teaching hostel facilities are well maintained. Hostel food is also good. We have all facilities like washing clothes and we have a generator facility also in the hostel. Our wife is well maintaining hospitality .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the course and faculty, with student-related issues, and very less placements.

review_content.Placements: About 30-40% of students secure placements. The highest package that I know is 40 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Bajaj Finance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Birla, and Tata. 40-50% of students get placed in Infinity Solutions. Job roles offered are website development, software development, Android app development, data analytics, and AI/ML.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides Wi-Fi, labs with good quality computers, and air-conditioned classrooms. Labs have central AC. There is a huge library with almost 50,000 to 60,000 books and it is on 2 floors. There are around 900-1000 computers with a powerful network. However, there are some issues with the high-speed network if there is a lot of load. There will be a network issue with mobile networks in some places.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life and atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students only get placements, and that too at very low packages. The lowest package is around 1.5 LPA. The highest package is around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Niotechone, Victasoft, 9brainz, Appmeddy, and Whitepearl. Internship options are most probably zero from the university side. You have to find it on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided but there are constant connectivity issues. It has slow speed and sometimes even the Wi-Fi doesn't get connected. PCs in the lab are lagging and slow. Classrooms are good but there is a barrier, that boys and girls should not sit together, even though we are in college. The library is good, but it also has slow Wi-Fi issues.

review_summary.college_name: Atmiya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Integrated) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Rajkot.

content.Placements: As we are studying currently no placements, but our seniors were placed. The package we will get is I think around 10 LPA to 20 LPA, which is quite good in this type of course. Every semester we have to do an internship, and we have fun while doing it.
content.Infrastructure: The best classrooms are provided with good ventilation and modern technology. The food is very good. Sports sessions are also in our curriculum. Medical facilities are also provided which is a good service.
content.Faculty: The teachers teaching us are very good with good behavior. Teachers are very good at teaching with the treasure of knowledge. Teaching quality and style is the best. Teachers explain with real-life examples. Course curriculum is also good to make students industry-ready. Semester examinations are somewhat difficult. Pass percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I choose this course for a good job.

content.Placements: There are many students. In BCA, almost 800 students enrolled, but you do not think that how many will be placed. Placements would help nearly 10/12 persons. Other will be not be placed. Approximately 2/3% of students will be placed hardly.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst that the internet accessibility at the college is poor. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for the BCA course, but they do not provide adequate materials. I’m often forced to purchase materials separately, and assignments that are required by the university are not provided either, placing additional costs on us.

content.Placements: There are many students. In BCA, almost 800 students enrolled, so you think about how much will be placed because the placement percentage is nearly 10-12%. Others will be not able to be placed. Almost 2-3% of students got placed hardly.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst which is the internet. It is not accessible in college. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for BCA. But after all, the faculty does not provide materials. I want to buy materials separately. Materials are not included in fees. The faculty requires assignments on university pages. It is not provided by the university. This cost will be on us.

admission_overview.college_name: Atmiya University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application Process

paragraphs: Atmiya University is a private institution with seven faculties offering more than49 coursesat UG, PG diploma and PhD levels. The university provides programmes inEngineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Health Sciences, Medicine, Law, Education and Liberal Arts. The University also offers PhD programmes in Engineering, Science, Pharmacy and Management.
Admissions are granted either onmerit basisor throughstate and national-level entrance exams. The mode of application isonline.
Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Selection process for most UG and PG programmes aremerit-basedwhile others require a valid score in entrance exams. For PhD, students should appear for theuniversity-level entrance exam - AUMPETfollowed by an interview. Students who have qualified for national or state-level entrance tests such asCSIR-NET, GATE, GPAT or UGC-NETare exempted from the university level exam.
The fee and average package offered are presented below:
Seat intake at Atmiya University is differenet across courses and disciplines, which is presented here:

The admission process includes filling the online application form. The section process is entrance and merit based, depending upon the course. For courses such as BTech, MBA, MCA and BPharm, entrance exam scores are accepted. Admission to BA, BSc, BBA and BCom is done on merit basis. Students should achieve the cutoff marks set by the University. All shortlisted students are required to attend the counselling process.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering at Atmiya University?
faqs.answer: For admission into the B.Tech Mechanical Engineering course at Atmiya University, Rajkot, candidates have to pass class 12 from a recognised board with at least 60% marks in aggregate with PCM as the main subject combination. A relaxation of 5% is given to the candidates from the reserved categories

cut_off.college_name: Atmiya University Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Round Wise Ranks

description: Atmiya University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Atmiya University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Atmiya University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 29459 and 50400 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Civil Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 29459 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Information Technology and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respecti

Atmiya University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Atmiya University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Atmiya University GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 14988 to 38988. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by . These branches

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.
In the final round for the General HS category, the Atmiya University B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 14988 to 38988, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

gallery_page.college_name: Atmiya University Photos & Videos

videos.title: Atmiya Institute of Pharmacy, Rajkot -College Review by the Students
Atmiya Institute of Pharmacy, Rajkot -College Review by the Students

hostel.description: The Institute has magnificently designed separate hostels for boys each with all modern facilities, for boarding and other recreational activities. The hostels have their own mess to provide good and hygienic food to the students. Well-furnished and spacious rooms are there for 350+ boys. There are cubical as well as dormitories for the students. Each room is well-equipped with a bed, a study table, study chair, almirah and an easy chair. The mess is maintained on a co-operative basis. Both hostels have common rooms, gyms, volleyball ground and cricket ground. Spacious common rooms are provided in all the hostels, which are a place for constructive activities like indoor games, discussions and get together within the hostel. Indoor games like carom board, chess, table tennis are provided on the campus. There is a separate Badminton court in both the hostels and sports equipment is provided from the hostel’s sports committee. The hostel provides the students with daily newspapers and various magazines to make them aware of the daily happenings of the world.

library.description: The Library and Learning Centre (LLC) spreads over to ground plus 3 floors. It is centrally air-conditioned, well-protected with fire alarm CCTV surveillance. It has specialized collections of books, journals and other resources in Sciences, Engineering and Technology, Humanities, Social Sciences and Management ranging from printed books, e-books, Kindle e-book readers, back volumes and CDs\DVDs. The LLC subscribes to national and international journals in print and e-journals. The LLC has a video conferencing facility and NPTEL video courses. The LLC is using NewGenLib software for library automation with WEB-OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue), an online search facility. There are many learning activities conducted by the LLC, one such being the MakerSpace which provides an environment to develop an idea into a prototype. The LLC stays well connected with all the departments and centers on the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Ground, Handball, Kho-Kho, Athletics

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Rajkot.
reviews.review_text: The best classrooms are provided with good ventilation and modern technology. The food is very good. Sports sessions are also in our curriculum. Medical facilities are also provided which is a good service.

reviews.review_heading: I choose this course for a good job.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst that the internet accessibility at the college is poor. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for the BCA course, but they do not provide adequate materials. I’m often forced to purchase materials separately, and assignments that are required by the university are not provided either, placing additional costs on us.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the course and faculty, with student-related issues, and very less placements.
reviews.review_text: College provides Wi-Fi, labs with good quality computers, and air-conditioned classrooms. Labs have central AC. There is a huge library with almost 50,000 to 60,000 books and it is on 2 floors. There are around 900-1000 computers with a powerful network. However, there are some issues with the high-speed network if there is a lot of load. There will be a network issue with mobile networks in some places.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided but there are constant connectivity issues. It has slow speed and sometimes even the Wi-Fi doesn't get connected. PCs in the lab are lagging and slow. Classrooms are good but there is a barrier, that boys and girls should not sit together, even though we are in college. The library is good, but it also has slow Wi-Fi issues.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but the faculty needs improvements.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst which is the internet. It is not accessible in college. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for BCA. But after all, the faculty does not provide materials. I want to buy materials separately. Materials are not included in fees. The faculty requires assignments on university pages. It is not provided by the university. This cost will be on us.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, and education but average placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were not available, so students had to stay near the college. Transportation was available in the nearby city. The library was good, and the classrooms were not fully air-conditioned. Only normal classrooms were available. Air-conditioned classrooms were located in another building, the Virani building. The labs were good enough.

reviews.review_heading: As I told above, you can read my review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. But because this institute is driven by Swaminarayan Gurukul, college life is not good. The canteen facility is very poor. I don't live in the hostel, but as per my knowledge, the hostel is good. The food is Jain food across the whole campus, and even the canteen also has only Jain food.

reviews.review_heading: Make bright future with us.
reviews.review_text: In my college, specific courses have specific labs like the Microbiology lab, Chemistry lab, PGDMLT lab, research lab, and many more labs. There is also a big library. There is only a boys' hostel. My college has separate boys' and girls' canteens. Sports-related, culture-related, and many more extracurricular activity-related clubs are there.

reviews.review_heading: Good college infrastructure with school-type system.
reviews.review_text: Multiple labs for every department with high-end configuration systems and internet accessibility with internet ID/password security. Lab security is high with multiple cameras in labs. There is a big lobby for the lab with wooden floors and AC facilities. It's a good place.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics with vibrant campus life and industry focus.
reviews.review_text: Atmiya University offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels provide clean and spacious rooms. It has basic amenities with hygienic and nutritious food served in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are readily available, ensuring student health and safety. Sports and recreational facilities, including playgrounds and indoor games. It promote physical fitness and leisure, creating a balanced environment for academic an...

reviews.review_heading: One day at ATMIYA with the student of ATMIYA.
reviews.review_text: There's a hostel facility for boys. There are 3 sharing rooms with a cleaning staff and mess and a healthy environment like fresh air and a clean atmosphere with the topping of trees and plants. Medical facilities are also available in the hostel for emergencies, and there are various pieces of equipment available for games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Atmiya College Review, It's Not So Good.
reviews.review_text: There is no doubt about our college infrastructure. The classrooms, the labs, and mainly our library are nice. Our college library has three floors with books related to each and every subject. Also, our college provides facilities for disabled people.

reviews.review_heading: Average Placements & Faculty Members, Outdated Curriculum, Good Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available across the whole campus. Computer labs are average but sufficient for development and other curriculum activities. Classrooms are pretty huge and well-lit. The best resource that you can use is the library at Atmiya. The library has 3 floors, including a reading room. The library offers an e-library section with lots of computers available for you from morning to evening.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good till this date, and it's an awesome college to explore yourself.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library in our city with above 1 lacs+ books. There were good WiFi connections in each hostel room. The infrastructure of our college was good. The food of Mess is quite good, pure authentic Gujarat food and only vegetarians are included.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members and campus life.
reviews.review_text: I'm not living in the hostel, but I have many friends who live in hostels. They tell me about hostel life in some words; the hostel is very comfortable, and the Wi-Fi is very fast, and the food is also hygienic. Sometimes I also have lunch with my friends, and it tastes very good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Atmiya University

likes.text: Many Companies live Infosys, Wipro and Tata Company comes for the Better placement of talented students.
The placements at Atmiya are very good, and well-reputed companies visit our college for recruitment.

review_summary.college_name: Dolphin (PG) College of Science and Agriculture Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cardiac Care Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good paramedical college.

content.Placements: Students are from different states of India. The majority are from Kashmir and the Northeast. The maximum package can vary from hospital to hospital and sector to sector. Many students get internships in good hospitals and are hired there as employees. It is a paramedic college which is in high demand these days.
content.Infrastructure: High-quality classrooms with a good environment. 24-hour Wi-Fi is provided. The library has a good collection of books. Books are available for issue for 15 days. The mess and canteen food are good, and there are 24-hour medical facilities. Different sports are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Optometry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed from this college.

content.Placements: 60% students got placed from suhana hospital. 20000 to 30000 for per month are the salaries offered. Suhana hospital is the top recruiter. The college doesn't give us internships.
content.Infrastructure: The boys hostel is very far away form college, almost 1 to 2 kms away from the college. The college provides bus but it only runs in 6 months. For the rest of the 6 months, we walk and go to the college. The hostel has Wi-Fi but its speed is very disappointing. Food is good but in sometimes we don't eat the hostel food. Sports activities like cricket, volleyball, and kabaddi are played in the college .

content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, knowledgeable, and cooperative. Some of them are studying Ph.D. They always clear the doubts of the students.

faqs.answer: M Pharmacy is a 2-year PG course that delves into the advanced study of pharmaceutical sciences. M Pharmacy is designed for students who wish to deepen their knowledge of drug development, pharmacology, and pharmacy practice. Students can check the list of reasons to pursue MPharma course from Kamla Nehru College of Pharmacy:Advanced Knowledge and Skills: An M Pharmacy course provides in-depth knowledge and specialization in various areas of Pharmacy. Specialization: M Pharmacy courses often offer a range of specializations, allowing candidates to focus on an area that aligns with their interests and career goals. Career Opportunities: M Pharmacy graduates can work in pharmaceutical companies, research and development, quality control, regulatory affairs, clinical trials, academia, hospital pharmacy, and government agencies. Research and Innovation: Many M Pharmacy courses emphasize research, allowing candidates to contribute to scientific advancements and innovations in the pharmaceutical field.
